steps.title: Keep helped as the main verb
steps.content: The subject is "This cadre of renowned authors," and the main verb later in the sentence is "helped." The material about what the authors asserted should modify the subject rather than create another main verb.

steps.title: Use the participial phrase
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B insert finite verbs before "helped." Choice C also introduces a finite verb and misuses the comma. A comma plus "asserting" creates a participial modifier while "helped" remains the main verb. The answer is D.
